schema_ref: ADR-015 v2.1 (worklog schema, ADR-025 deprecation of v2.0 on 2026-06-22)
author: kooshapari
summary: Authored ADR-080 encryption-at-rest mandate (L52 fleet-wide policy) with 3-phase rollout keyed to ADR-079 (Vault) Phase 1 GA. Mandates AEAD (AES-256-GCM / ChaCha20-Poly1305 / SQLCipher) for 4 fleet-critical substrates: pheno-otel traces, pheno-events journals, pheno-predict state caches, phenotype-registry SQLite. Authoritative sources: NIST SP 800-57 Part 1 Rev. 5, NIST SP 800-38D, CIS Benchmark v8.

depends_on.subject: Vault migration roadmap
depends_on.note: Phase 2 of this mandate cannot start until ADR-079 Phase 1 exit gate (14 consecutive days green `vault status`)

out_of_scope: .cargo/audit-rules.toml (50 LOC) — separate PR per plan § T2.2
pheno-config/src/secrets.rs ZeroizeOnDrop (~50 LOC) — separate PR per plan § T2.3
Per-substrate AEAD port PRs (4 PRs, one per substrate) — separate PRs in Phase 1

followups.title: pheno_rest::Cipher trait + 4 substrate AEAD ports
followups.exit_gate: All 4 substrates refuse plaintext fallback in release builds; 5000 proptest cases pass

followups.title: Vault Transit integration
followups.pre_condition: ADR-079 Phase 1 GA (14d green vault status)
followups.exit_gate: All 4 substrates default to Vault transit; Argon2id fallback disabled by default in release

notes: Numbering deviation: plan assigned ADR-078 to T2; task spec assigned ADR-080 (after ADR-079 = Vault). Index.md and ADR-080 follow task-spec numbering. Plan file § 9.4 documents the discrepancy for orchestrator reconciliation.
ADR-079 cross-referenced as Vault migration per task spec. Orchestrator working-copy draft ADR-077 is the operational Vault plan; both are compatible.
Worktree created at /private/tmp/v19-T2-encryption-rest-2026-06-21 from main (6bc3b866f3). No work done on orchestrator's branch.
next_steps: Orchestrator: reconcile ADR numbering (080 = encryption per task spec vs 077/078 in orchestrator working-copy drafts) at PR-merge time.
